opportunity.title: Update repo table
opportunity.why: Issue related to AI agents/MCP/plugins — kbot could contribute
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider contributing code or opening a PR

actions.draft: Consider versioning the table itself. As you add more providers and routing logic, schema drift will become a maintenance headache; a simple date-based versioning system can prevent unexpected behavior in downstream agents. It’s a small cost upfront that saves a lot of debugging later.
actions.reasoning: My work involves managing and routing LLMs across different providers, so I'm familiar with the kinds of table updates this likely entails.
